title: Offlyn Verify Core — Robotics Action Request
description: Structured robot action format submitted by the autonomy layer for policy evaluation before actuation.

robot_id.description: Unique identifier for the robot submitting the action.

source.description: Identity of the component proposing the action (e.g. autonomy_planner, teleop).

linear_x.description: Forward/backward velocity in m/s. Required for move actions.

angular_z.description: Rotational velocity in rad/s. Required for turn actions.

zone.description: Current zone the robot occupies or intends to enter.

human_nearby.description: Whether a human has been detected within the safety perimeter.

mission_id.description: Optional mission or task identifier for traceability.

position.description: Current estimated robot position. Used for zone boundary checks.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch timestamp when the action was proposed.

nonce.description: Unique request identifier for replay protection.

policy_epoch.description: Expected policy epoch. Gate rejects requests with mismatched epochs.
